reason: Verified that agent "QA-20260614-210642-6ux7" can receive messages and respond correctly with "4" to the question "What is 2+2?"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with sidebar containing agent list
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260614-210642-6ux7" in sidebar — Agent page loaded, showing agent name and "idle" status
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status showed "idle", which meets the requirement
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input box — Message text successfully entered in the input field
Clicked Send message button — Message was sent and a new chat session "Simple Math Question Session" was created
Waited for agent response — Agent responded within 1 second with the message "4"
Verified response mentions "4" — Agent's response clearly displays "4" which is the correct answer to 2+2, shown in the chat history below the user message
Took screenshot of final state — Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4" with "Worked for 1s" indicator
